text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Doubling the academy's equipment, all for the
sake of the Umamusume... Simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Agreed! Isn't it just? But that's only the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear voices coming from a nearby room and
decide to take a peek.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Declaration! I promise to turn this gym into an
unparalleled center of sporting excellence! I will
enlarge it by ten... no, one hundred times!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
One hundred times... Amazing! Simply amazing!
Only the director of the esteemed Tracen
Academy would undertake such a feat!
choice_data_list: How much space do you think we have?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Shock! That Tazuna-esque interjection... Oh, it's
you, Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies! I got carried away by the interview
and completely forgot about the size of the
academy grounds!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I'm at fault as well. I got a little carried
away with the director's love for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But the strength of that love is just a part of what
makes her so amazing.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Could I trouble you for a comment? From your
perspective as a trainer, what's your opinion on
the director?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Anticipation! I would love to hear your opinion!
choice_data_list: She can get out of hand sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Embarrassment! I feel rather bashful, being
praised so frankly!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But I still have a great deal of room to grow.
There is still much to be done for the Umamusume
of the world.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Therefore! Please save the word "respect" for
after I make the URA Finale a success!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Inspirational! What a truly wonderful person the
director is!
choice_data_list: (The director's style of speaking is spreading!)

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Even knowing she has the respect of her trainers,
she refuses to compromise on her own
improvement!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, she has no intention of stopping until she
provides a stage where Umamusume all over the
world can shine! Simply amazing! I must write
about this!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Permission granted! As Tracen Academy spreads
its influence throughout the globe, by all means,
document our every move!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And you!
Trainer <username>!
Let's do our utmost to help every
Umamusume shine!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the true spirit of Tracen Academy... This will
make an amazing article!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, I've gotten caught in an
international scoop...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so inspired by the director's passion that I
go back to training <chrname> with
renewed enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Shocking! Tazuna does often warn me to think before I speak...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But please, clemency! I assure you, I only wish to
help our Umamusume perform at their best in
races!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see, so the director's erratic behavior is all
because of her love for Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I-in other words, would you say you're committed
to giving your students whatever support they
need?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you seek to care for them not
only from birth to graduation, but past their
retirement and into their old age?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! I hereby swear to support the lives of all
Umamusume! I do believe that will make a
wonderful article!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A-apologies! I got carried away again—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director! What have you done now?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Eep! Abscond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, Tazuna strictly warns the director to
think before she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so inspired by the director's passion that I
go back to training <chrname> with
renewed enthusiasm.
